name: Margarete
notes_from_family: Margarete sometimes forgets she has already taken her morning medication. If she asks, suggest she check the pill organiser before taking more.
She does not like the bus, prefers walking or taxis.
Anna calls every Sunday evening — if Margarete sounds worried, suggest she wait and tell Anna on Sunday.
medical_notes_stub: Medical details would appear here in production. For the MVP, we only repeat what the family entered and never give medical advice.
